{{Quote|I saw him walk out of the geyser field. All the geysers went off at once, and he just strode out of the steam.|Warton about Luke Skywalker|<ref name="js" /> }}
'''Warton''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] former colonist from the [[Volcano/Legends|volcanic]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Eol Sha]]. He led [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] to [[Gantoris]], a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], for his new [[Jedi Praxeum|Jedi Academy]].<ref name="js" />

Warton, along with the other colonists, were relocated to the planet [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]]. He, his [[Glena|wife]], and his fellow evacuees were [[Death/Legends|killed]] when [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala|Daala]] razed the fledgling group. His death was one of the many that sparked Gantoris's fall to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] and death.<ref name="js" />
